SEARCH
Package com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout

Class Ball

java.lang.Object
com.scanlinearcade.games.breakout.Ball
public class Ball extends Object
Domain Model Class: Ball

Intent: Models the moving ball entity in Breakout, including position, velocity, speed progression, frame-to-frame motion, and bounce behavior when contacting boundaries, the paddle, and bricks.

Public API Signatures:

  • public Ball(int startX, int startY, int radius)
  • public void reset(int startX, int startY)
  • public boolean update(Rectangle bounds, Paddle paddle, Bricks bricks, BreakoutScore score)
  • public void draw(Graphics2D g2)
  • public Rectangle getRect()
  • public void bounceX()
  • public void bounceY()
  • public double getDx()
  • public double getDy()

Package-private API Signatures: None in current implementation.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Ball(int startX, int startY, int radius)
    Creates a ball and initializes it to the provided starting position.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    bounceX()
    Reverses horizontal velocity.
    void
    bounceY()
    Reverses vertical velocity.

    Draws the ball.
    double

    Returns horizontal velocity.
    double
    getDy()
    Returns vertical velocity.
    Rectangle
    getRect()
    Returns the current collision rectangle of the ball.
    void
    reset(int startX, int startY)
    Resets the ball to the provided position and default launch speed.
    boolean

    Advances the ball by one frame and resolves collisions.

  • Constructor Details

    • Ball

      public Ball(int startX, int startY, int radius)
      Creates a ball and initializes it to the provided starting position. Signature: public Ball(int startX, int startY, int radius)
      Parameters:
      startX - initial x-coordinate of the ball center
      startY - initial y-coordinate of the ball center
      radius - radius of the ball in pixels

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset(int startX, int startY)
      Resets the ball to the provided position and default launch speed. Signature: public void reset(int startX, int startY)
      Parameters:
      startX - x-coordinate of the reset position
      startY - y-coordinate of the reset position

    • update

      public boolean update(Rectangle bounds, Paddle paddle, Bricks bricks, BreakoutScore score)
      Advances the ball by one frame and resolves collisions. Signature: public boolean update(Rectangle bounds, Paddle paddle, Bricks bricks, BreakoutScore score)
      Parameters:
      bounds - rectangular play area boundaries
      paddle - paddle to collide with, if any
      bricks - brick field to collide with, if any
      score - score model to update on brick hits
      Returns:
      true when the ball falls below the bottom bound, otherwise false

    • draw

      public void draw(Graphics2D g2)
      Draws the ball. Signature: public void draw(Graphics2D g2)
      Parameters:
      g2 - graphics context used for rendering

    • getRect

      public Rectangle getRect()
      Returns the current collision rectangle of the ball. Signature: public Rectangle getRect()
      Returns:
      rectangle enclosing the rendered ball

    • bounceX

      public void bounceX()
      Reverses horizontal velocity. Signature: public void bounceX()

    • bounceY

      public void bounceY()
      Reverses vertical velocity. Signature: public void bounceY()

    • getDx

      public double getDx()
      Returns horizontal velocity. Signature: public double getDx()
      Returns:
      horizontal speed component

    • getDy

      public double getDy()
      Returns vertical velocity. Signature: public double getDy()
      Returns:
      vertical speed component
